title: Polymarket gamblers threaten to kill me over Iran missile story
author: defly
aiHeadline: Gamblers on Polymarket are so desperate to win their bets that they're threatening to off me if I don't spin the Iran missile story their way.

title: Palestinian boy, 12, describes how Israeli forces killed his family in car
author: tartoran
aiHeadline: A 12-year-old Palestinian boy tells the heartbreaking tale of how Israeli forces took out his entire family while they were just trying to get around in their car.

title: Corruption erodes social trust more in democracies than in autocracies
author: PaulHoule
aiHeadline: Corruption is like a thief in the night, but it seems democracies are its favorite victims, losing trust faster than autocracies can say 'we told you so.'

title: MoD sources warn Palantir role at heart of government is threat to UK security
author: vrganj
aiHeadline: UK's Ministry of Defence is sounding the alarm that Palantir, the data wizard behind the scenes, might be the biggest threat to national security. Who knew data could be so dangerous?

title: US Job Market Visualizer
author: andygcook
aiHeadline: Check out this US Job Market Visualizer, the ultimate tool for job seekers to navigate the labyrinth of employment opportunities. It's like a treasure map for your career!
